nasb.text: ‘Therefore thus says the Lord God, “Behold, I will bring upon you a sword and I will cut off from you man and beast.

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God: Behold, I will bring a sword upon you, and will cut off from you man and beast,

cnv.text: 因此，主耶和華這樣說：看哪！我必使刀劍攻擊你，把人和牲畜都從你那裡剪除。

ccb.text: “‘因此，主耶和华说，看啊，我要使刀剑临到你，消灭你的人畜，
